The '''''Sable III''''', originally known as the '''''Anto's Star''''', was a modified [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] used by the flamboyant pirate [[Drek Drednar]] and his crew. The ship was stolen by a group of starship thieves working for Drednar who was planning a mutiny against [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Karn Granzor]].

==Description==
The ''Anto's Star'' had was a standard [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] with a normal armament of 6 double [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]]. After Drek Drednar and his crew took over the ship and defeated the [[DP20 gunship/Legends|gunship]] ''[[Sable II]]'', the newly-commissioned ''Sable III'' received numerous upgrades: The [[Technician/Legends|mechanics]] upgraded the hull and [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] and installed two salvaged gun turret mounts from the ''Sable II''. These mounts were later equipped with an [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] and a [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]]. Additionally, a salvaged tractor beam was installed for a front turbolaser.<ref name="AJ5" />

The docking bay carried five non-hyperdrive snubfighter, usually three [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] and two [[Zebra starfighter]]s, leaving one slot for emergencies.<ref name="AJ5" />

The ship was decorated with the "[[Blazing Claw/Legends|Blazing Claw]]" symbol, which had been an icon for piracy for thousands of years in the history of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="AJ5" />

==History==
When the ship was stolen, it had barely made more than a dozen jumps. When landed in a starport, Drek Drednar planned a mutiny against his captain Karn Granzor. Eventually, the ''Anto's Star'' faced Granzor's ''[[Sable II]]'' in a space battle and Drednar was victorious. Drednar renamed ''Anto's Star'' the ''Sable III'' and installed several salvaged components and marked it with the traditionally "Blazing Claw".<ref name="AJ5" />

Drednar's preferred tactic was [[The Barricade]]. He used the ''Sable III''{{'s}} tractor beams to move [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] into the way of [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]] and pull other ships out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. While Drednar had no preference in targets, he avoided [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ships and retreated when more powerful ships like a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], were pulled into [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]].<ref name="AJ5" />

The ''Sable III'' was damaged when it engaged the [[Annihilator (Imperial I-class)|''Annihilator'']] and had to flee into the [[Quintar Nebula/Legends|Quintar Nebula]]. There, Drednar discovered the hidden [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Taraloon]], where he set up his new [[Taraloon Pirate Complex|base]]. The base included maintenance and hangar bays for the ''Sable III''.<ref name="AJ5" />

When Imperial operations concentrated more onto [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] activities, Drednar used to new-found freedom of movement to attack less remote targets.<ref name="AJ5" />
